name: WWF-India
tagline: Building a future where people and nature thrive
description: WWF works to conserve nature and reduce the most pressing threats to the diversity of life on Earth. Our vision is to build a future where people live in harmony with nature.

name: Wildlife Trust of India
description: WTI is committed to the conservation of wildlife and its habitat. Working across India, WTI has been instrumental in protecting endangered species and their ecosystems.

name: The Nature Conservancy
description: A global environmental organization working to create a world where people and nature can thrive. We tackle climate change, protect lands and waters, and provide food and water sustainably.

name: Greenpeace India
description: Greenpeace India campaigns for environmental protection and promotes peace. We investigate, expose and confront environmental abuse by governments and corporations.

name: Ocean Conservancy
description: Working to protect the ocean from today's greatest global challenges. We create evidence-based solutions for a healthy ocean and the wildlife and communities that depend on it.

name: Rainforest Alliance
description: We're creating a more sustainable world by using social and market forces to protect nature and improve the lives of farmers and forest communities.

name: Centre for Science and Environment
description: CSE is a public interest research and advocacy organization based in New Delhi. We research into, lobby for and communicate the urgency of development that is both sustainable and equitable.

name: 350.org
description: We're an international movement of ordinary people working to end the age of fossil fuels and build a world of community-led renewable energy for all.

name: Bombay Natural History Society
description: BNHS is one of the largest non-governmental organizations in India engaged in conservation and biodiversity research. We promote the enjoyment and conservation of nature.

name: Environmental Defense Fund
tagline: Finding practical solutions to environmental problems
description: We work on urgent threats spanning climate, oceans, ecosystems and health. Our scientists, economists and attorneys create practical solutions that win lasting political, economic and social support.

name: Sankalp India Foundation
description: Working towards environmental conservation, renewable energy adoption, and sustainable livelihoods in rural India. We focus on community-led initiatives for a greener future.

name: Conservation International
description: We protect nature for the benefit of humanity. Through science, policy, and partnerships, we spotlight and secure the most important places in nature for the climate, biodiversity, and people.

name: Grow Trees
description: India's largest tree plantation organization. We enable individuals and organizations to plant trees across India, contributing to reforestation, carbon offset, and rural employment.

name: International Fund for Animal Welfare
description: IFAW rescues individual animals, safeguards populations, preserves habitats, and advocates for greater protections. We work across 40 countries to save and protect animals.

name: Kalpavriksh
description: A voluntary organization working on environmental and social issues in India. We focus on biodiversity conservation, community rights, and sustainable alternatives.
